mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.tenant_id, u.username, u.password_hash, COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.permission_code ORDER BY p.permission_code SEPARATOR ','), '') AS permissions FROM tenant t JOIN iam_user u ON u.tenant_id = t.id LEFT JOIN iam_user_role ur ON ur.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN iam_role r ON r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN iam_role_permission rp ON rp.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND rp.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN iam_permission p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE t.tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.deleted = 0 AND u.username = #{username} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.tenant_id, u.username, u.password_hash
